title: Visiania pubinervis
taxonomy: Visiania pubinervis is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically found in countries such as Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana, and Nigeria. The classification of Visiania pubinervis places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, and class Liliopsida. Further classification also includes the order Arecales, family Arecaceae, and genus Visiania. Within the genus Visiania, Visiania pubinervis is a distinct species.
